title: Responses to Official Information Act requests - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā urupare ki ngā tono Official Information Act

## Responses to Official Information Act requests
Responses to Official Information Act (OIA) requests that have substantive information and are of public interest.
- Our published OIA responses
Responses to Official Information Act requests

## Our published OIA responses
The Official Information Act 1982 (OIA) lets eligible people request information from Ministers or departments, including the Ministry of Education.
We often get requests about important public issues. To promote openness and accountability, we publish selected responses to these requests.
We share responses that provide significant information and are of public interest. Personal details of requesters are removed.
Documents are available in Adobe PDF format only. Accessible versions, where available, can be supplied on request.
Email: enquiries.national@education.govt.nz
For more information or to submit a request, email info@education.govt.nz .
- Making an official information request
- Official Information Act and media responses
